title: lotus strigosus var. nudiflorus
intro: Lotus strigosus var. nudiflorus, commonly known as the woolly-podded lotus, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the Nelumbo genus. This aquatic plant is native to parts of Asia and is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds. The health benefits of Lotus strigosus var. nudiflorus include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and aid in wound healing. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or topical creams, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
